title: Neon Meteor Run
description: A polished local arcade survival run with pulse bursts, shield pickups, combo sparks, and escalating meteor waves.
controls: Arrow keys or WASD to steer
Press Space to trigger a pulse burst
Collect sparks to stack score and survive the full timer
releaseNotes: Upgraded the flagship game to a canvas-driven arcade run with pulse attacks and health-based survival.
Added combo scoring, shield pickups, local high-score persistence, and escalating meteor intensity.

title: Hextris Archive Cabinet
description: An embedded reflex puzzle experience powered by an external arcade-compatible browser build.
controls: Use the backup open-tab link if embedding fails
releaseNotes: Added cabinet metadata and runtime status cards.
Embed fallback now surfaces a direct open-tab action.

title: Oregon Trail Archive
description: A museum-style archive embed that brings a landmark DOS journey directly into the hub.
controls: Open in a new tab if the emulator is blocked
releaseNotes: Catalog copy and archive positioning refreshed for the new live feed layout.

title: Pixel Drift 2099
description: A future-ready catalog slot for another fast twitch cabinet racer coming next.
releaseNotes: Roadmap teaser added to the live cabinet feed.
